mapper.select: SELECT BIZ_NO FROM TB_BUSINESS WHERE BIZ_ID = #{bizId}

SELECT p.PRODUCT_ID, p.PRODUCT_CD, p.PRODUCT_NAME, p.BIZ_NO, p.CATEGORY_ID, c.CATEGORY_NAME, TO_NUMBER(p.PRICE) AS PRICE, TO_NUMBER(p.SALE_PRICE) AS SALE_PRICE, TO_NUMBER(p.STOCK_QTY) AS STOCK_QTY, p.STATUS_CD, p.BRAND_NAME, p.REG_DATE, f.FILE_URL AS THUMBNAIL_URL FROM TB_PRODUCT p JOIN TB_PRODUCT_CATEGORY c ON c.CATEGORY_ID = p.CATEGORY_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT REF_ID, FILE_URL, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY REF_ID ORDER BY FILE_ID) AS RN FROM TB_FILE WHERE REF_TYPE = 'PRODUCT' ) f ON f.REF_ID = p.PRODUCT_ID AND f.RN = 1 WHERE ORDER BY p.PRODUCT_ID DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_PRODUCT p WHERE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_PRODUCT ( PRODUCT_ID, PRODUCT_CD, PRODUCT_NAME, BIZ_NO, CATEGORY_ID, PRICE, SALE_PRICE, STOCK_QTY, DESCRIPTION, BRAND_NAME, STATUS_CD, REG_DATE ) VALUES ( #{productId}, #{productCd}, #{productName}, #{bizNo}, #{categoryId}, #{price}, #{salePrice}, #{stockQty}, #{description}, #{brandName}, #{statusCd}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') )
INSERT INTO TB_FILE (FILE_ID, REF_TYPE, REF_ID, FILE_URL, ORIGIN_NAME, REG_DATE) VALUES (SEQ_FILE.NEXTVAL, 'PRODUCT', #{productId}, #{fileUrl}, #{originName}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT p.PRODUCT_ID, p.PRODUCT_CD, p.PRODUCT_NAME, p.BIZ_NO, p.CATEGORY_ID, TO_NUMBER(p.PRICE) AS PRICE, TO_NUMBER(p.SALE_PRICE) AS SALE_PRICE, TO_NUMBER(p.STOCK_QTY) AS STOCK_QTY, p.DESCRIPTION, p.BRAND_NAME, p.STATUS_CD FROM TB_PRODUCT p WHERE p.PRODUCT_ID = #{productId} AND p.BIZ_NO = #{bizNo}
SELECT CATEGORY_ID, PARENT_ID, CATEGORY_NAME, DEPTH FROM TB_PRODUCT_CATEGORY WHERE DEPTH IN ('2','3','4') AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY DEPTH, CATEGORY_ID
SELECT OPTION_ID, PRODUCT_ID, OPTION_COLOR, OPTION_SIZE, ADD_PRICE, STOCK_QTY FROM TB_PRODUCT_OPTION WHERE PRODUCT_ID = #{productId} ORDER BY OPTION_ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_PRODUCT_OPTION (OPTION_ID, PRODUCT_ID, OPTION_COLOR, OPTION_SIZE, ADD_PRICE, STOCK_QTY) VALUES (#{optionId}, #{productId}, #{optionColor}, #{optionSize}, #{addPrice}, #{stockQty})
